automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: Aipify monitors your workflows, self-healing systems, and operational automation health.
automations.name: Automation

executiveSummary.intro: Aipify is monitoring your automations and self-healing systems.

insight.title: Aipify Insight
insight.healthy: All automations are healthy. Aipify is monitoring in the background.
insight.needsAttention: Some automations need review. Aipify recommends checking warning signals soon.
insight.critical: Critical automation issues detected. Aipify recommends immediate review.
insight.improving: Automation health is improving. Aipify continues monitoring recovery progress.
insight.healthyWithFocus: Most automations are healthy. {name} is performing well.
insight.criticalWithFocus: {name} has critical signals and should be reviewed immediately.
insight.needsAttentionWithFocus: Most automations are healthy. {name} has recent warning signals and should be reviewed.

automations.emptyHealthy: All automations are healthy. Aipify is monitoring in the background.

patterns.empty: No approved patterns available for this environment.

domainsTab.empty: No domains registered for this customer.

intelligence.privacyNote: Aipify learns only from operational metadata. No conversations, identities, invoices, or uploaded files are stored.

brain.title: Aipify Brain
brain.subtitle: The intelligence layer that observes, learns, and recommends improvements across all environments.

learningGovernance.title: Learning governance
learningGovernance.subtitle: Global safeguards, rollout pipeline, and pilot validation before general availability.

learningQueue.title: Learning Queue
learningQueue.subtitle: Newly discovered patterns awaiting admin review before promotion to global intelligence.
learningQueue.reviewReasonPlaceholder: Brief explanation for this decision (stored in audit log)

globalPatterns.title: Global Patterns
globalPatterns.subtitle: Approved, anonymised patterns that improve every installation.

selfHealing.title: Self-Healing Center
selfHealing.subtitle: Aipify monitors failures and attempts safe recovery actions automatically.

insight.title: Aipify Insight
insight.healthy: No self-healing actions were needed recently. Aipify will continue monitoring.
insight.active: Today Aipify prevented service interruptions by reconnecting integrations and retrying failed jobs.

settings.title: Intelligence Settings
settings.subtitle: Learning levels, tenant isolation, and privacy principles.

internal.title: Level 1 — Internal Learning
internal.description: Aipify Group AS operational data. Full learning allowed. Highest trust. Never shared externally without approval.

pilot.title: Level 2 — Pilot Learning
pilot.description: Unonight production validation. Operational metadata only. Requires admin approval before becoming global.

customer.title: Level 3 — Customer Learning
customer.description: External customer operational patterns. Strict tenant isolation. No conversations, identities, or documents stored.

global.title: Level 4 — Global Intelligence
global.description: Approved anonymised patterns that improve every installation across the ecosystem.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant isolation model
tenantIsolation.description: Internal patterns stay internal. Pilot patterns stay with Unonight. Customer patterns remain customer-specific. Only approved global patterns are shared ecosystem-wide.

publicTrust.title: How Aipify learns safely
publicTrust.description: Aipify learns from operational metadata, not private customer content. Conversations, invoices, identities, uploaded files, and payment details are never used for shared learning. Only approved and anonymised operational patterns may improve the global Aipify system.

auditLog.title: Intelligence Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Pattern reviews and learning events across the intelligence engine.

pending.title: Pending Actions
pending.subtitle: Prepared solutions awaiting your approval before Aipify executes them safely.

approved.title: Approved Actions
approved.subtitle: Actions approved and ready for execution.

executed.title: Executed Actions
executed.subtitle: Successfully completed actions with verified outcomes.

failed.title: Failed Actions
failed.subtitle: Actions that failed, were rejected, or required rollback.

templates.title: Action Templates
templates.subtitle: Reusable operational playbooks Aipify uses to prepare safe actions.

policies.title: Approval Policies
policies.subtitle: Risk-based rules that determine when human approval is required.

logs.title: Execution Logs
logs.subtitle: Full audit trail for every action — who approved, who executed, and what happened.

stats.title: Platform statistics
stats.subtitle: Usage, growth, and health metrics across the platform.
stats.comingSoon: Platform statistics will be available in a future release.

pilot.title: Unonight Pilot Installation
pilot.subtitle: Install and activate Aipify safely as a tenant inside Unonight.
pilot.notProvisioned: Unonight tenant has not been provisioned yet.
pilot.createTenantFirst: Create the Unonight tenant to begin the pilot checklist.

customerZero.title: Customer Zero Center
customerZero.subtitle: Unonight is Aipify's first operational environment — learn, validate, measure value, and improve before external expansion.
customerZero.noRecommendations: No pending recommendations — observation phase active.
customerZero.privacyNote: Metadata only — no customer operational content, email, chat, or order data.

unonightPilot621.title: Unonight Pilot Control
unonightPilot621.subtitle: Controlled pilot activation — read-only discovery, real data ingestion framework, and shadow mode.
unonightPilot621.privacyNote: Metadata only — no private messages, chat bodies, albums, images, or payment data.
unonightPilot621.externalConnectionNote: External Unonight read-only API views or Supabase views still required for live ingestion beyond workflow event stubs.

buildGovernance.title: Build Health Center
buildGovernance.subtitle: Route governance, build stability, and architecture protection for the Aipify platform.
buildGovernance.registrySubtitle: Registered routes across Customer App, Platform Admin, API, Marketing, and Business Packs.

commercialIntelligence.title: Revenue Operations & Commercial Intelligence
commercialIntelligence.subtitle: MRR, ARR, forecasts, attribution, churn intelligence, and growth drivers across the portfolio.

customerSuccessHub.title: Customer Success Center
customerSuccessHub.subtitle: Guide, teach, recommend, and assist before support is needed — one engine for customer health, onboarding, and adoption.
customerSuccessHub.principle: The best support ticket is the one that never needs to be created.

playbooks.title: Customer Success Playbooks
playbooks.description: Structured playbooks for onboarding, adoption, renewal, and expansion.

onboardingPage.title: Customer Onboarding
onboardingPage.subtitle: Track account setup, domain connection, team invitation, Business Packs, integrations, training, and Companion activation.

businessPackFactory.title: Business Pack Factory
businessPackFactory.subtitle: Build, test, certify, and publish industry Business Packs assembled from reusable platform engines.
businessPackFactory.principle: Aipify builds one platform — industry solutions are assembled from reusable engines, not separate products.
businessPackFactory.emptyState: Business Pack Factory data is unavailable.
businessPackFactory.legacyLink: Open legacy Business Packs product page

builderPage.title: Business Pack Builder
builderPage.subtitle: Assemble modules, workflows, reports, Companion skills, automations, knowledge templates, and approval flows.

skillsPage.title: Companion Skill Builder
skillsPage.subtitle: Industry-aware Companion capabilities contributed by each Business Pack.

testingPage.title: Business Pack Testing Center
testingPage.subtitle: Test permissions, workflows, Companion skills, mobile access, marketplace installation, and simulation integration.

aosCore.title: AOS Core Center
aosCore.subtitle: Central platform governor coordinating engines, orchestration, dependencies, feature flags, health, governance, and execution across Aipify.
aosCore.principle: Every engine works independently. Every engine works together. Aipify behaves as one platform — not disconnected modules.
aosCore.emptyState: AOS Core Center data is unavailable.

enginesPage.title: Engine Registry
enginesPage.subtitle: Central registry of every platform engine — status, dependencies, health, and Business Pack usage.

featuresPage.title: Feature Flag Engine
featuresPage.subtitle: Gradual rollout controls for dashboards, Companion skills, marketplace features, and enterprise capabilities.

companionPersonality.title: Companion Personality Center
companionPersonality.subtitle: Platform governance for Companion personality, adaptive communication, relationship models, trust, and human-centered interaction — one Companion everywhere.
companionPersonality.principle: People build relationships with personalities — not interfaces. One Companion. One Personality. One Relationship Framework.
companionPersonality.emptyState: Companion Personality Center data is unavailable.

verifiedProviders.title: Verified Provider Registry
verifiedProviders.subtitle: Platform governance for the verified provider network — identity, verification, services, contracts, and performance.
verifiedProviders.principle: Only verified providers receive trusted status. Companion coordinates — platform governs.

developerEcosystem.title: Developer Portal
developerEcosystem.subtitle: Documentation, APIs, SDKs, testing, publishing, and analytics for the Companion extension ecosystem.
developerEcosystem.principle: Aipify provides the platform. The ecosystem provides innovation.

ecosystemCenter.title: Ecosystem & Marketplace Governance
ecosystemCenter.subtitle: Provider registry, Business Pack publishing, certifications, marketplace governance, revenue sharing, and ecosystem intelligence.
ecosystemCenter.principle: One Aipify ecosystem — providers extend ABOS through certified Business Packs; governance and human accountability remain unchanged.
ecosystemCenter.privacyNote: Platform-wide aggregates only — provider operational data stays with providers and customers.
ecosystemCenter.noRecords: No records in this section yet.

developerCenter.title: Business Pack Developer Center
developerCenter.subtitle: SDK, manifests, permissions, sandboxes, validation, API registry, publishing, certification, and marketplace pipeline for approved pack developers.
developerCenter.principle: Aipify provides the development platform — approved developers build Business Packs that extend ABOS under governance, certification, and human accountability.
developerCenter.privacyNote: Developer Platform aggregates metadata only — no customer operational records or PII.
developerCenter.noRecords: No records in this section yet.

businessPackRuntime.title: Business Pack Runtime Center
businessPackRuntime.subtitle: Secure deployment, domain verification, lifecycle management, health monitoring, rollbacks, and incident governance for installed Business Packs.
businessPackRuntime.principle: Business Packs run inside secure, tenant-isolated runtime — domain-verified, capability-governed, and lifecycle-managed by Aipify.
businessPackRuntime.privacyNote: Runtime Center aggregates deployment metadata only — no customer operational records.
businessPackRuntime.noRecords: No records in this section yet.

reliabilityOperations.title: Reliability Operations Center
reliabilityOperations.subtitle: Platform observability, self-healing, incident lifecycle, SLO management, maintenance, and status communication.
reliabilityOperations.principle: Aipify observes, correlates, and heals safely — humans approve sensitive recovery; technology fades into reliable operations.
reliabilityOperations.privacyNote: Platform-wide reliability metadata — customer APP surfaces see tenant-scoped summaries only.
reliabilityOperations.noRecords: No records in this section yet.

changeOperations.title: Change Operations Center
changeOperations.subtitle: Release governance, change requests, deployments, approvals, environments, evidence, and Companion Change Advisor for platform operators.
changeOperations.principle: Every production change is governed — segregated approval, verified evidence, and transparent customer communication.
changeOperations.privacyNote: Change metadata only — no customer operational records in platform governance views.
changeOperations.noRecords: No records in this section yet.
